titleStmt.title: SII 5.422: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 422. (A.R. No. 133 of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vāykkeḻvikkumel śrīkomāṟavaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakravatti kaḷ coṇāṭuṅkoṇṭu muṭikoṇṭa
vīrābhiṣe kam paṇṇiyaruḷiya śrīsundarapāṇḍyade vaṟku yāṇṭu 10 7 vati netirāmāṇṭi netirāmā ṇ
ṟu Irupatteḻān tiyatiyum pūrvva pakṣattu pratha maiyun tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūr(ā)ṭṭāti nāḷ kiḻve
lveliyil Ālālacuntaran tirumaṭatti lirukkun tapasya ril ceñlūr tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyā ṉaṉavaratāṉa
piye ṉeṅkaḷ pitākkaḷ tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉāṉa Aṇukkanampi tamakku naṉṟāka Uṭaiyār tirunelve
yiṉār koyilile ciṟukālai ssandhi yile ṣrirudra m Addhya yanampaṇṇuvatāka Irupattañ caccu nirvārttut
ṇṇukaikku kotaippirāṭṭimaṅkalattile palarpakkalum nel policaikku kuṭuttu Ivvaccu Irupa
ta policai nellu muppatiṉkalamum taṉakku dakṣi ṇaiyākak koṇṭu kotaippirāṭṭimaṅkala
Āṉantapiḷḷai Addhya yaṉampaṇṇi Avaṉukkup piṉpu Avaṉ makaṉu miṉṉāḷvarai Addhya yaṉampaṇṇip
ppotu Ivvaccut taṉikkoṇṭavarkaḷ Eṅkaḷpakka livvaccu niṟka vuṇṇāteṉ ṟiṉakkuc coṉṉamai
lil niṉṟu mivvac cirupattañcum vāṅki Ivvāṉantapiḷḷai kurukatti kuṇṭur śrīmādhavabhaṭaṭa ṉ vaitta
ṭu Aṉubha vittuvarukiṟa cattirappaṭi nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇiil vā(ḻa)ḷuṭaiya OṟṟiyārumThis word is written over an erasure.ku
tiṉeḻum I Āṉantapiḷḷai makaṉ perumāḷ kaiyil kuṭutta Accu Eṭṭum Āka Ivvaccu Irupattu
lūr nilattāl vanta bhoga mum Ivvaccu Eṭṭāl vanta palicaiyum Āka pūvaḻi nellu muppati
perumāḷ taṉakku dakṣi ṇaiyāka koṇṭu tāṉ cantirāditya vaṟ Addhya yaṉampaṇṇi poruvāṉākavum
ṉ varkattiluḷḷār Addhya yaṉampaṇṇi poruvārākavum Ippaṭi sammadi ttu Innāyaṉār koilile kalve
varatāṉaṉāṉa Aṇukkanampiyeṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai Aṉavaratāṉaṉ Aṇukkanampi Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 5.422 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
